source.body_text_sample:
Home
About Us

Store Locator

CAREERS

If you love kids, Kiddie Kobbler ™ is an awesome place to work – really awesome!

It is one of the biggest reasons we are a Canadian leader in children’s shoes. Our Store Owners and staff move mountains to deliver the best to our small clients and to the local communities we serve. We are always on the outlook for smart, hard-working people. But the most important trait is their “love for children”. We will take care of the training and the imparting of foot knowledge and service excellence.

You see, we believe it is not just about getting paid, but about “having and living” the passion of serving the needs of children that makes our lives richer and more fulfilling.

If you are interested in joining our unique team of professionals, email your resume to inquiries@kiddiekobbler.ca together with a short covering letter why you want to join us. Please also make sure you specify which store you would like us to forward your resume to. We look forward to hear from you.

THE IDEAL CANDIDATE SHOULD BE:
Mature (Mid-Twenties and up)
Great with kids and adults alike
Able to have fun but able to maintain control
Professional and punctual
Committed to your role in the store
Come join our winning team
ABOUT KIDDIE KOBBLER
